term: Hung a Little Flag on the Movie
pronunciation: /hʌŋ ə ˈlɪtl flæɡ ɑn ðə ˈmuːvi/
englishDefinitions: To mark or identify a movie with a small note or personal sign of attention.
To give a movie a slight label, hint, or personal annotation.
persianTranslation: روی فیلم یک نشانه کوچک گذاشت
برای فیلم یک علامت/یادداشت کوچک زد
فیلم را با یک نشانه کوچک مشخص کرد
examples: The critic hung a little flag on the movie by noting its unusual ending.
I hung a little flag on the movie in my notes because of the strong performances.
She hung a little flag on the movie to remind herself to recommend it later.
